name: pre-flight
description: Stakeholder reaction simulation for corporate communications. Pressure-tests any statement, press release, positioning deck, earnings script, M&A announcement, comment letter, or rebrand narrative against a dynamically-researched cast of stakeholders before publication. Composes the run from a library of modes grounded in real PR practice: crisis pre-flight, crisis tabletop, launch pre-mortem, regulatory response, deal comms, earnings rehearsal, positioning pressure test, counterfactual compare, red-team read, activist-proxy, exec-transition, internal-first. Industry-agnostic: factbase and persona cast are built per run from public sources, with persona bundles achieving interview-grade fidelity (Park et al. 2024) including verbatim signature quotes, forbidden phrases, and multi-lens expert reflection.
